name: surfaces a docs/logs file whose prefix matches a referenced #N
does NOT over-match — #76 must not surface 1076-*.md (anchor trap)
scans both docs/logs and docs/research, deduped and sorted
args:
## Notes
Follow-up from #1121. See log for #1076 and #1076 again.

name: ignores files outside docs/logs and docs/research (incl. nested subdir)
empty text and empty file list → []
null text and null file list → [] (offline-tolerant)
ref present but null file list → []
strips a leading ./ from candidate paths before matching
custom evidence dirs honored via third arg
